about: Buckland Cleaners & Tailors is a trusted neighborhood dry cleaner and tailoring shop located at 465 Buckland Road in South Windsor, Connecticut. They offer a comprehensive range of garment care services including professional dry cleaning, shirt laundering, wash-dry-fold, household linen cleaning, wedding dress cleaning, rug cleaning, and expert on-site tailoring and alterations. With dedicated tailoring hours and convenient delivery service, they make it easy to keep your wardrobe looking its best.

designBrief.colorDirection: crisp blues, white, slate grey, subtle teal accents
designBrief.inspiration: Premium laundry service. Crisp, clean aesthetic. Trust signals.
designBrief.avoidance: No clip art hangers or shirts. No dated stock photos. Must not reuse fonts from other sites in this project.
designBrief.heroStyle: Light, airy background with clean typography and a clear CTA
designBrief.uniqueElement: Animated garment care icon set or fabric texture background
